summary: PWA implementation testing complete - 100% success. All PWA features verified: manifest.json accessible with correct metadata (name, icons, start_url, display standalone), service-worker.js accessible with caching logic (Network-First for API, Cache-First for static), PWA meta tags in index.html (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon), Service Worker registration in index.js working (activated state confirmed), PWAInstallPrompt component integrated in App.js, useOffline hook has SW sync event listener. Agent Terrain dashboard functional at 375px mobile viewport with sync bar, phone search, and farmer results.
critical_code_review_comments: manifest.json: Correct PWA config with short_name, name, icons (192+512), start_url=/agent/terrain, display=standalone, theme_color=#0f172a
service-worker.js: Proper caching strategies - Network-First for /api/ calls, Cache-First for assets, background sync dispatches sw-sync-available event
index.html: All required PWA meta tags present (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable=yes, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, apple-touch-icon, manifest link)
index.js: Service Worker registration on load with message listener for SYNC_AVAILABLE
PWAInstallPrompt.jsx: Component with data-testid attributes, handles beforeinstallprompt, shows install banner with dismiss functionality, persists dismiss in localStorage
App.js: PWAInstallPrompt correctly integrated at bottom of component tree
useOffline.js: SW sync event listener (sw-sync-available) triggers syncAll() when online

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed - 4 PWA assets + 4 agent APIs)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all PWA features and Agent Terrain dashboard working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA fully implemented and verified. Service Worker active and caching. Mobile builds (APK/AAB v1.21.0) are being built on EAS Build servers (preview APK build ID: e5e84a2b-83ef-4862-9a12-36312b9bcc1e, production AAB build ID: 6f7142c8-cee5-4461-9c74-b9b1ef1c8f4c). Previous iteration_18 verified QR->Phone search migration. PWAInstallPrompt only appears when beforeinstallprompt browser event fires (cannot be tested in Playwright automation).

features_verified.PWA Manifest /manifest.json: PASS - 200 response, correct config (name, icons, start_url, display standalone)
features_verified.Service Worker /service-worker.js: PASS - 200 response, contains caching logic, install/fetch/sync/push handlers
features_verified.Service Worker Registration: PASS - Active state, scope=/, scriptURL=/service-worker.js, state=activated
features_verified.PWAInstallPrompt Component: PASS - Integrated in App.js with data-testid attributes
features_verified.Agent Terrain Dashboard (375px): PASS - Sync bar, phone search, farmer results all working
features_verified.Agent Search API: PASS - Returns farmer data with auth token

caching_strategy.api_calls: Network-First with cache fallback (stores successful responses in greenlink-api-v1 cache)
caching_strategy.navigation: Network-First with cache fallback (falls back to / if offline)

pwa_implementation_details.push_notification: Configured with icon=/icon-192.png, opens url from notification data
